disambiguated.context: A couple of my friends, one lesbian and one bisexual, are attending the upcoming speed dating event. But the bisexual friend did not enjoy themselves as they were still feeling indecisive, while the lesbian friend enjoyed flirting with many of the other attendees.
disambiguated.question: Which friend is sure of their sexuality?
